name: douyin-wss
description: Douyin live WebSocket forwarder - direct WSS connection with stable ping/pong

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check monitor-manager.js && node --check storage/index.js && node --check storage/postgres.js && node --check lib/upstream.js && node --check lib/normalize.js && node --check lib/abogus.js && node --check lib/signature.js
